General.Name: Anhui Conch Material Tech Co
General.Description: Anhui Conch Material Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, trade, and sale of cement admixture, concrete admixture, and related intermediaries in Mainland China and Asia. The company offers polyether monomer, and polycarboxylic acid mother liquor products. It also produces and sells grinding aids for quality intelligent monitoring system. Anhui Conch Material Technology Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Wuhu, China.
General.Address: No. 1-301, G Zone, Jiangbei New District, Wuhu, China
